sarva-rules-v0.label: Sarva Hybrid (rules + reasoning)
sarva-rules-v0.description: Hybrid keyword rules + confidence reasoning + capability bounds. Active until trained LoRA is promoted after RunPod.

sarva-v1.label: Sarva v1 LoRA
sarva-v1.description: First trained Sarva adapter slot — Nemotron-Nano-30B. Promote when eval passes.

sarva-v2.label: Sarva Conductor v2
sarva-v2.description: Target slot for next RunPod QLoRA train (master train JSONL). After HF push: scripts/plug_sarva_after_train.py --promote --approve. Serve with deploy/runpod/serve_sarva.py and set SARVA_INFERENCE_URL.
